Title: TC-E2E-001: Published page accessible on frontend - same language
Preconditions:
1. User is logged in on storefront
2. Page exists with status Published and language matching user's storefront language
3. Page has no organization restrictions
Steps:
1. Set storefront language to match page language (e.g., pl-PL)
2. Navigate to page permalink (e.g., /pl/qa1)
Expected Result: Page should load successfully with content rendered

Title: TC-E2E-002: Published page 404 on frontend - wrong language
Preconditions:
1. User is logged in on storefront
2. Page exists with status Published in language pl-PL
3. Storefront is set to en-US
Steps:
1. Set storefront language to en-US
2. Navigate directly to /qa1 (without language prefix)
Expected Result: Page should return 404 error

Title: TC-E2E-003: Page URL requires language prefix
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with permalink /qa1 and language pl-PL
2. User is on storefront with Polish language
Steps:
1. Navigate to /pl/qa1
2. Observe URL structure
Expected Result: URL should include language prefix (e.g., /pl/qa1)

Title: TC-E2E-004: Search returns only current language pages
Preconditions:
1. Pages exist in multiple languages (e.g., pl-PL and en-US)
2. User is on Polish storefront (pl-PL)
Steps:
1. Open search bar on storefront
2. Type keyword that matches a page name
3. Observe PAGES section in search results
Expected Result: Only pages with pl-PL language should appear in search results

Title: TC-E2E-005: Search does not show pages from other languages
Preconditions:
1. Page 'Watermelon Page builder32432' exists in de-DE language
2. User is on English storefront (en-US)
Steps:
1. Search for 'Watermelon' in English storefront
2. Observe PAGES section
Expected Result: Page should NOT appear in search results (wrong language)

Title: TC-E2E-006: Organization-restricted page accessible to authorized user
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with organizationId set to user's organization
2. Page is Published
3. User belongs to the same organization
Steps:
1. Navigate to page permalink
2. Observe page rendering
Expected Result: Page should load successfully for authorized organization user

Title: TC-E2E-007: Organization-restricted page 404 for unauthorized user
Preconditions:
1. Page 'Page33' exists with organizationId = 'Cypress-Company-Kft.'
2. User belongs to 'Müller % Schmidt GmbH'
3. Page is Published
Steps:
1. Navigate to /page33
2. Observe page rendering
Expected Result: Page should return 404 error (wrong organization)

Title: TC-E2E-008: Organization-restricted page not in search for unauthorized user
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with organization restriction (different from user's org)
2. Page is Published
3. Page has matching language
Steps:
1. Search for restricted page name
2. Observe PAGES section in search
Expected Result: Page should NOT appear in search results for unauthorized user

Title: TC-E2E-009: Public page (no org) accessible to all authenticated users
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with organizationId = null (no restriction)
2. Page is Published
3. User is authenticated
Steps:
1. Navigate to page permalink
2. Observe page rendering
Expected Result: Page should load successfully for any authenticated user

Title: TC-E2E-010: Public page appears in search for all users
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with no organization restriction
2. Page is Published
3. Language matches storefront
Steps:
1. Search for public page name
2. Observe PAGES section
Expected Result: Page should appear in search results for all users

Title: TC-E2E-011: Visibility ON - page accessible to all users
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with visibility = true
2. Page is Published
3. No organization/user group restrictions
Steps:
1. Navigate to page permalink
2. Test with authenticated user
3. Test with anonymous user (if allowed)
Expected Result: Page should be accessible to all users when visibility is ON

Title: TC-E2E-012: Visibility OFF - page only for registered users
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with visibility = false
2. Page is Published
3. User is NOT logged in
Steps:
1. Navigate to page permalink as anonymous user
2. Observe page rendering
Expected Result: Page should return 404 or redirect to login when visibility is OFF

Title: TC-E2E-013: Visibility OFF - page accessible to registered users
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with visibility = false
2. Page is Published
3. User IS logged in
Steps:
1. Login to storefront
2. Navigate to page permalink
Expected Result: Page should load successfully for authenticated users when visibility is OFF

Title: TC-E2E-014: Published page appears in search
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with status Published
2. Language matches storefront
3. No organization restrictions
Steps:
1. Search for page name on storefront
2. Observe PAGES section in search results
Expected Result: Published page should appear in search results

Title: TC-E2E-015: Draft page NOT accessible on frontend
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with status Draft
2. Language matches storefront
Steps:
1. Navigate directly to draft page permalink
2. Observe page rendering
Expected Result: Draft page should return 404 error (not published)

Title: TC-E2E-016: Draft page NOT in search results
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with status Draft
2. Language matches storefront
Steps:
1. Search for draft page name
2. Observe PAGES section
Expected Result: Draft page should NOT appear in search results

Title: TC-E2E-017: Archived page NOT accessible on frontend
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with status Archived
2. Language matches storefront
Steps:
1. Navigate directly to archived page permalink
2. Observe page rendering
Expected Result: Archived page should return 404 error

Title: TC-E2E-018: Archived page NOT in search results
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with status Archived
2. Language matches storefront
Steps:
1. Search for archived page name
2. Observe PAGES section
Expected Result: Archived page should NOT appear in search results

Title: TC-E2E-019: Newly published page becomes accessible
Preconditions:
1. Draft page exists with valid permalink
2. Language is en-US
Steps:
1. Publish page from Page Builder Admin
2. Navigate to frontend
3. Access page permalink
Expected Result: Newly published page should be accessible immediately

Title: TC-E2E-020: Unpublished page becomes inaccessible
Preconditions:
1. Published page exists and is accessible
2. User is on frontend
Steps:
1. Unpublish page from Page Builder Admin
2. Refresh frontend
3. Try to access page
Expected Result: Unpublished page should return 404

Title: TC-E2E-021: Archived page becomes inaccessible
Preconditions:
1. Published page exists and is accessible
2. User is on frontend
Steps:
1. Archive page from Page Builder Admin
2. Refresh frontend
3. Try to access page
Expected Result: Archived page should return 404

Title: TC-E2E-022: Search API includes pageDocuments query
Preconditions:
1. User is on storefront
2. Search feature is used
Steps:
1. Open browser DevTools Network tab
2. Type in search bar
3. Inspect GraphQL request
Expected Result: Request should include pageDocuments query with cultureName filter

Title: TC-E2E-023: Page context API includes language filter
Preconditions: 1. User navigates to page URL
Steps:
1. Open browser DevTools Network tab
2. Navigate to page URL
3. Inspect GetPageContext GraphQL request
Expected Result: Request should include cultureName parameter matching storefront language

Title: TC-E2E-024: Combined filter - language + organization
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with language pl-PL AND organization restriction
2. User is on Polish storefront but wrong organization
Steps:
1. Navigate to page permalink
2. Observe page rendering
Expected Result: Page should return 404 (organization mismatch)

Title: TC-E2E-025: Combined filter - language + visibility
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with language de-DE AND visibility OFF
2. Anonymous user on German storefront
Steps:
1. Navigate to page permalink as anonymous
2. Observe page rendering
Expected Result: Page should return 404 (visibility requires login)

Title: TC-E2E-026: Page without permalink not accessible
Preconditions:
1. Page exists without permalink (empty string)
2. Page is Published
Steps:
1. Try to construct URL without permalink
2. Observe behavior
Expected Result: Page should not be accessible - no valid URL

Title: TC-E2E-027: Multiple pages same language - all searchable
Preconditions:
1. Multiple Published pages exist in same language
2. No restrictions on pages
Steps:
1. Search for common keyword
2. Observe PAGES section
Expected Result: All matching pages should appear in search results

Title: TC-E2E-028: Search with special characters
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with name containing special chars (e.g., 'qa & 1')
2. Page is Published and accessible
Steps:
1. Search for 'qa & 1'
2. Observe PAGES section
Expected Result: Page should be found even with special characters in name

Title: TC-E2E-029: Partial search match for pages
Preconditions:
1. Page 'qa & 1' exists and is Published
2. Storefront language matches
Steps:
1. Search for 'qa'
2. Observe PAGES section
Expected Result: Page should be found with partial keyword match

Title: TC-E2E-030: Case-insensitive search for pages
Preconditions:
1. Page 'Watermelon' exists and is Published
2. No restrictions apply
Steps:
1. Search for 'WATERMELON' (uppercase)
2. Observe PAGES section
Expected Result: Page should be found regardless of case

Title: TC-E2E-031: Scheduled page with future start date - not accessible
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with startDate in future
2. Page is Published
Steps:
1. Navigate to page permalink
2. Observe page rendering
Expected Result: Page should return 404 (scheduling not yet active)

Title: TC-E2E-032: Scheduled page with past end date - not accessible
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with endDate in past
2. Page is Published
Steps:
1. Navigate to page permalink
2. Observe page rendering
Expected Result: Page should return 404 (scheduling expired)

Title: TC-E2E-033: Scheduled page within valid date range - accessible
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with startDate in past and endDate in future
2. Page is Published
Steps:
1. Navigate to page permalink
2. Observe page rendering
Expected Result: Page should be accessible (within scheduled window)

Title: TC-E2E-034: User group restricted page - authorized group
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with userGroups restriction
2. User belongs to authorized group
Steps:
1. Navigate to page permalink
2. Observe page rendering
Expected Result: Page should be accessible for users in authorized group

Title: TC-E2E-035: User group restricted page - unauthorized group
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with userGroups restriction
2. User does NOT belong to authorized group
Steps:
1. Navigate to page permalink
2. Observe page rendering
Expected Result: Page should return 404 for users not in authorized group

Title: TC-E2E-036: Empty page renders shell only
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with no content from designer
2. Page is Published and accessible
Steps:
1. Navigate to page permalink
2. Observe page rendering
Expected Result: Page should render header/footer but empty main content area

Title: TC-E2E-037: Page with content renders correctly
Preconditions:
1. Page exists with content from designer
2. Page is Published and accessible
Steps:
1. Navigate to page permalink
2. Observe page content
Expected Result: Page should render full content from page designer

Title: TC-E2E-038: PAGES section appears in search dropdown
Preconditions:
1. At least one page matches search query
2. User is on storefront
Steps:
1. Type search query
2. Observe search dropdown
Expected Result: PAGES section should be visible in search dropdown alongside products

Title: TC-E2E-039: Click page in search navigates correctly
Preconditions:
1. Page appears in search results
2. Storefront language is correct
Steps:
1. Search for page
2. Click on page in PAGES section
Expected Result: User should navigate to page URL with correct language prefix

Title: TC-E2E-040: Page Builder Admin shows correct frontend URL
Preconditions:
1. Page exists in Page Builder Admin
2. Page has valid permalink
Steps:
1. Open page in Page Builder Admin
2. Observe domain displayed before permalink
Expected Result: Domain should show frontend URL (e.g., https://vcst-qa-storefront.govirto.com)
